summary: Bug fix verified: Gradebook, Grade Report, and Report Card endpoints now correctly show AI-graded submissions. The GET /api/gradebook/{class_id} endpoint merges AI grades into grades_map with is_ai_graded=True flag and includes AI assignments with is_ai=True. All 18 tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Gradebook endpoint (server.py:2190-2290): Correctly queries ai_submissions collection with $or for both assignment_id and ai_assignment_id fields. Merges AI grades into grades_map only if key doesn't exist (preserving manual grades). AI assignments added to assignments list with is_ai=True.
Grade Report endpoint (server.py:2292-2442): Uses token-based name matching via names_match() helper. Correctly counts ai_assignments_completed per student.
Report Card endpoint (server.py:4039-4211): Fetches AI submissions and matches by email first, then by name using names_match(). AI grades categorized with '(AI)' suffix.
names_match() helper (server.py:135-155): Handles partial names, middle initials, and Spanish name particles correctly.

seed_data_used.manual_grades: assign_a7a55e0a: Maria Garcia 35pts, Maria Garcia (student_ea7cb18e5b4f) 28pts, Carlos Lopez 32pts
seed_data_used.ai_grades: aiassign_5aa71494: Maria Garcia 66pts (100%), aiassign_83a2256e: exists but matched to different student

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified. Gradebook now merges AI grades from ai_submissions collection. Test file test_gradebook_ai_grades_integration.py covers all three endpoints (gradebook, report, report-card) and name matching. Use class_d79a6790 with test@school.edu credentials for testing.

gradebook_returns_ai_assignments.details: GET /api/gradebook/class_d79a6790 returns 2 AI assignments with is_ai=True: aiassign_5aa71494 (Basic Math Fun!, 66pts) and aiassign_83a2256e (Charlotte's Web Novel Quiz, 100pts)

gradebook_merges_ai_grades.details: grades_map includes student_ea7cb18e5b4f_aiassign_5aa71494 with score=66, is_ai_graded=true

manual_grades_not_overwritten.details: Manual grades (e.g., student_40da2916_assign_a7a55e0a=35pts) preserved without is_ai_graded flag

report_card_shows_ai_category.details: Report Card shows 'Tarea (AI)' category with 66/66 points (100%)

name_matching_partial.details: Verified via ai_submissions_count=2 matching students by name

data_consistency.details: AI assignment count consistent between gradebook (2) and report (2)

bug_rca.root_cause: Gradebook endpoint only queried the 'grades' collection, missing AI-graded submissions stored in 'ai_submissions' collection. When teachers used AI Grading, scores were saved to ai_submissions but never appeared in the Gradebook grid.
fix_applied: 1. Added query to ai_submissions collection at server.py:2216-2223 with $or for both assignment_id and ai_assignment_id fields
2. Built student lookup maps for email and name matching at server.py:2226-2235
3. Merged AI grades into grades_map at server.py:2243-2270, using names_match() for flexible matching
4. Added AI assignments to assignments list at server.py:2272-2282 with is_ai=True flag
5. Manual grades take precedence (key not overwritten at server.py:2261)
bug_rca.verification: Confirmed via API: grades_map now includes AI grade entry with is_ai_graded=true, and assignments array includes AI assignments with is_ai=true
